title: TRIMET LIFT PROGRAM - 211info
text: TRIMET TRIMET LIFT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shared-ride, public transportation service with door-to-door pickups and dropoffs within the TriMet service area. Reservations must be made by 5pm the previous day before the scheduled trip. 101 SW Main Street Suite 700 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Must be certified as meeting ADA paratransit eligibility criteria. An individual may be eligible for service if they have a disability or disabling health condition, and their disability or health condition prevents them from independently using TriMet buses and/or trains some or all of the time (without assistance, other than from a bus driver). Hours: Reservations: 7 days per week 7am-6pm Rides: 7 days per week 3:30am-2:30am Email (503) 962-8000 - 1 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 962-8000 LIFT-Option 1 TTY 711 Alternate (503) 962-3434 Automated Phone System Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for application FEES: $2.80 for each ride DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Disability Related Transportation Other Services Offered At This Location: TRANSPORTATION - TRIMET If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TRIMET
